SubItem.Name: Pn006: Delay time to power off after MBR = OFF
Pn021: Default baudrate of programming port
Pn027: Delay time to run after power on
Pn205: Position command feedforward filter time

Pn207: Position command moving average filter time
Pn220: Torque command first-order delay filter time
Pn250: Speed loop control mode toggle selection
Pn251: Torque command toggle trigger threshold

Pn254: Position error toggle trigger threshold
Pn414: Position pulse number of motor's one turn
Pn418: Servo lock option when speed mode stopped
Pn419: Acc/Dec type of speed control mode
Pn420: Acc time 1 of speed control mode
Pn421: Dec time 1 of speed control mode
Pn422: Acc time 2 of speed control mode
Pn423: Dec time 2 of speed control mode
Pn424: Acc/Dec S-curve proportion 1 of speed control mode
Pn425: Acc/Dec S-curve proportion 2 of speed control mode

Pn449: Multiplier of communication type encoder output
Pn454: Z-phase pulse width of communication type encoder
Pn466: Alarm threshold for CSP command pulse frequency overhigh

Pn486: The pulses number that the load rotates 1 turn in absolute position rotation mode

Pn496: Positive software position limit value
Pn498: Negative software position limit value
